steps.title: Spot the scope of the passage
steps.content: The passage isn't about a single benefit of bicycles—it covers multiple areas: travel freedom, living arrangements, leisure activities, and social participation. The text emphasizes the breadth of what bicycles enabled.

steps.title: Match the scope to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A states the bicycle “provided new opportunities for people”—a framing broad enough to cover the passage's multiple areas (travel, living arrangements, leisure, social participation).

The other choices either narrow focus to a single element or introduce unsupported information.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
